title: Nuclear Weapons
body:
# Nuclear Weapons
[![Download on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Modrinth-1bd96a?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nuclear_weapons)
## Overview
**Nuclear Weapons** is a datapack that adds a Nuke and other items to your Minecraft World.
## Items
- Nuke
- Radioactive Milk
## Features
### Nuke
The nuke spawns 100 blocks above the impact from the nuke ray

6 areas affected by radioactive fallout following the nuclear explosion

<details>
<summary>1st Zone</summary>

### 1st Zone | Radioactive Radiation
  **(Distance from the impact less than 200 blocks)**
  
   Poison 1 / **10 minutes**

</details>



<details>
<summary>2nd Zone</summary>

### 2nd Zone | Ignition
  **(Distance from the impact less than 100 blocks)**
  
   Poison 3 / **15 minutes**
   
   Hunger 2 / **15 minutes**
   
   On Fire

</details>



<details>
<summary>3rd Zone</summary>

### 3rd Zone | Cell deterioration
  **(Distance from the impact less than 50 blocks)**
  
  Wither 3 / **20 minutes**
  
  Poison 4 / **20 minutes**

</details>



<details>
<summary>4th Zone</summary>

### 4th Zone | Burning
  **(Distance from the impact less than 25 blocks)**
  
  Slowness / **20 minutes**

</details>



<details>
<summary>5th Zone</summary>

### 5th Zone | Radioactive Glowing
  **(Distance from the impact less than 12.5 blocks)**
  
  Poison 10 / **25 minutes**
  
  Wither 5 / **25 minutes**
  
  Nausea 3 / **25 minutes**
  
  Radioactive Glowing / **25 minutes**

</details>



<details>
<summary>6th Zone</summary>

### 6th Zone | Death Weaknesses
  **(Distance from the impact less than 6.25 blocks)**
  
  Mining Fatique 3 / **34 minutes**
  
  Hunger 5 / **34 minutes**
  
  Blindness / **34 minutes**
  
  Weakness 2 / **34 minutes**


</details>

### Radioactive Milk

obtained if you are radioactively contaminated

**When consumed**:

Poison 3 / **10 minutes**

Hunger 2 / **10 minutes**
